description_long: This rice cooker features a cylindrical main body with a slightly flared rim and a removable inner pot, both finished in a dark metallic and matte black color scheme. The front of the cooker displays a control panel with two prominent buttons, likely for cooking and warming functions, and a small indicator light. The body is constructed from a combination of metal and plastic, with side handles for easy lifting and a recessed area for the control panel. The lid is bowl-shaped, removable, and appears to be made of metal, fitting snugly over the top opening. The overall design is compact and functional, suitable for countertop use in kitchens or communal urban spaces. No visible brand logo or power cord is present in the images.
description: A compact, cylindrical rice cooker with a dark metallic and matte black finish, featuring a removable lid and a front control panel with two buttons.
description_view_0: Front view showing the control panel with two buttons and indicator, as well as the open top and removable lid.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the rounded body, side handle, and the profile of the removable lid.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the cooker, with no visible controls or features, and the open top.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other handle and the smooth, featureless side of the cooker.
attribute_control_panel_layout: The control panel is located on the front and consists of two oval buttons arranged vertically, with a small indicator light above them. No labels, icons, or display screens are visible.
attribute_lid_design: The lid is bowl-shaped, removable, and made of metal, with no visible handle, lock, vent, or window.
attribute_handle_type: Two fixed, horizontal side handles are integrated into the body, made of plastic and colored black.
